title: Christmas Crosshair
description: 🎄 Simple Christmas-themed crosshair with festive Green, red, and snowy white colors!
body:
Get into the holiday spirit with this Christmas Crosshair! 🎄
This simple UI pack gives your Minecraft crosshair a festive mix of red, green, and snowy white — perfect for December gameplay.
Lightweight, clean, and fully compatible with any other texture pack — just drop it on top in your resource packs list!

Features:

Christmas-inspired red, green, and white crosshair 🎯

Works with all resolutions (16x and higher)

Perfect for PvP or survival

No performance impact
